title: Qdrant Chunk Payload Contract v1
description: Canonical payload of a Qdrant knowledge-chunk point. PRODUCER: ingestion_worker. CONSUMER: core-api retriever. Both cross-enforce via contract tests. Additive fields allowed; renaming/retyping a listed field is breaking.

chunk_id.description: Stable chunk id; also the Qdrant point id. See chunk_identity.md.

document_id.description: Parent document id within its source.

tenant_id.description: Hard tenant-isolation key. Keyword-indexed; the retriever filters on it.

text.description: The chunk text that gets injected into the LLM context.

permissions.description: Role tags. Keyword-indexed. The retriever admits a chunk if the caller holds any of these or the chunk is tagged 'public'.

screened.description: DD-13: true once the chunk has passed ingest-time screening (both guards ran). Absent/false => not screened.

injection_risk.description: DD-13: P(prompt-injection) from Prompt Guard 2 at ingest. Retrieval may down-rank / neutralize on this; it is a signal, never an autonomous gate.

content_hash.description: Per-chunk content hash used for delta/dedup against the registry.

field_role.description: For structured sources, the logical field this chunk came from (e.g. ticket 'description' | 'resolution' | 'notes').

metadata.description: Open bag for source-specific enrichment not promoted to a top-level field.
